name: to_exponential_histogram
description: Converts histogram-like values to an exponential histogram.

params.name: field
params.description: The histogram value to be converted

examples:
FROM histogram_standard_index
 | WHERE STARTS_WITH(instance, "hand-rolled")
 | EVAL converted = to_exponential_histogram(responseTime)
 | SORT instance
 | KEEP responseTime, converted
